arts.ttl: Barcelona star suffers injury in warm-up for Sevilla clash
arts.sum: Barcelona have on Sunday evening been dealt a fresh blow on the personnel front. This comes after Eric García was forced into a premature departure from the warm-up for the…

arts.ttl: Barcelona director aims 'project' dig at former manager Xavi
arts.sum: Deco has aimed a sly dig at former Barcelona manager Xavi Hernandez, saying that the club needed a coach who "believed in the project" this season. Speaking at the Ordinary General Assembly of FC Barcelona this week, sporting director Deco was keen to praise Flick while also having a dig at ex-manager Xavi.

arts.ttl: Fears spread that on-loan Barcelona star has picked up a serious injury
arts.sum: A member of the Barcelona loan army may have picked up a serious injury on Sunday. That’s according to Marca, who point towards Clément Lenglet as the player in question.…

arts.ttl: Ballon d’Or winner reveals Barcelona’s Lamine Yamal ‘reminds me of myself’
arts.sum: Former Barcelona striker Rivaldo has this weekend drawn comparisons between himself and current Blaugrana talent Lamine Yamal. Wide-man Lamine, for his part, is of course in the midst of nothing…

arts.ttl: Confirmed: Barcelona star condemned to bench vs Sevilla with fresh fitness issue
arts.sum: Barcelona star Frenkie de Jong has missed out on a place in the club’s starting XI once more on Sunday. This comes amid confirmation that the Dutchman is struggling with…

arts.ttl: Barcelona set sights on ‘the Ecuadorian Haaland’
arts.sum: La Liga giants Barcelona are amongst the leading suitors of young striker Juan Riquelme Angulo. That’s according to Diario Sport, who have named the Blaugrana as one of a number…

The beautiful temporary home of the world’s greatest football club in the capital of Catalonia is the site of a huge La Liga game for Barcelona as the leaders welcome historic rivals Sevilla for a crucial Sunday night clash. We don’t have a lot of rules here, but there are a few things to keep in mind when joining our matchday threads:

arts.ttl: Why is Marc-Andre Ter Stegen not playing for Barcelona today against Sevilla in LaLiga?
arts.sum: FC Barcelona welcome back some injured players but they are still without Marc Andre Ter Stegen as he recovers from an injury sustained in the LaLiga game against Villarreal earlier in the month, forcing Hansi Flick to rely on Iñaki Peña. An official club statement said that he “ underwent successful surgery on the patellar tendon injury in his right knee, performed by Dr. Joan Carles Monllau under the supervision of the Club’s Medical Services at Barcelona Hospital.”

arts.ttl: ‘This has made me stronger’ - Gavi opens up on injury recovery
arts.sum: Barcelona have welcomed Gavi back to the squad for the first time in 348 days after the midfielder recovered from a serious knee injury. Gavi also spoke about how he believes the injury has made him stronger and expressed his gratitude for the support he received from fans and team-mates.

arts.ttl: Liverpool line up Barcelona defender as Trent replacement
arts.sum: Liverpool are ready to submit a summer bid of €50m (£41.7m) to sign Barcelona’s Jules Kounde. Arne Slot’s side are scouring Europe for potential replacements for Trent Alexander-Arnold, who is out of contract at the end of the season and attracting interest from Real Madrid.
